creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Franco Fichtner from comment #2)

I appreciate the thought, but it'll take me longer to fetch/patch from bugzilla or arc patch from Phabricator, that to write a MOVED line :)

In future though (where changes are > trivial), Phabricator reviews are faster to fetch/apply patches from (arc patch DXXXX) -> profit)
